calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-229 confirmatory replication of 514o (independent seeds 45/46/47) -> 4th genuine exp entry for provisional->stable
items.note: Confirmatory replication of V3-EXQ-514o (PASS/supports 2026-06-15, GAP-2/GAP-7 closed). Independent seed triple [45,46,47] vs 514o [42,43,44]. 4th genuine experimental entry to clear MECH-229 provisional->stable (needs >=4 exp entries; exp_conf 0.868 already > 0.80 floor; 514o was the 3rd). Dry-run smoke PASS 2026-06-15 (seed 45: C_WL 0.778, 9 scored WL steps, non_degenerate). Substrate-marginal contact guard + falsifier off-ramp identical to 514o.

items.title: arc_062 GAP-B behavioural falsifier (MECH-309/ARC-062): committed-class entropy on the 666c-validated crf-availability-maintenance substrate (supersedes V3-EXQ-654b)
items.note: arc_062_rule_apprehension:GAP-B committed-class entropy behavioural falsifier (MECH-309/ARC-062), supersedes V3-EXQ-654b. Port of the 654b single-variable ARM_OFF vs ARM_ON falsifier onto the NOW-VALIDATED crf-availability-maintenance substrate: V3-EXQ-666c PASSed 2026-06-15 (ARM_2 mean_frac_maintained 0.854 > 0.625 floor, all 4 readiness preconditions met) and flipped substrate_queue crf-availability-maintenance ready=True (REE_assembly origin/master be7261d9ca). 654/654a/654b ALL FAILed non_contributory / substrate_not_ready_requeue for the SAME reason: the C1c readiness floor crf_frac_active>=0.30 was never met (654b measured 0.130) because the CandidateRuleField pool churned (mint->retire->re-mint) and never HELD >=2 differentiated rules active, so the committed-class falsifier DV never scored. 654c arms ARM_ON with the 666c ARM_2 levers crf_mature_pool_dynamics + crf_context_from_e2_world_forward + crf_availability_maintenance (floor 0.45 / decay 0.0) on top of crf_persist, at an ENLARGED P0 maturation window 200 ep (was 150; matches the 666c budget that formed full-pool differentiation PRE-gap on all 3 seeds), with the frozen-encoder P1 trained-bias-head REINFORCE phase (GAP-D leg). PRIMARY DV = committed-class entropy. Pre-registered non-vacuity preconditions, each self-routing substrate_not_ready_requeue (NEVER a false weakens): (i) C1c crf_frac_active>=0.30 actually clears now; (ii) propagation non-vacuity -- ARM_ON committed lateral_pfc bias differs from ARM_OFF (the bias reaches committed action). claim_ids=[MECH-309, ARC-062]: ONLY the PASS branch (C2 committed-class entropy lift on >=2/3 seeds) weights them, as supports. OFF-RAMP (pre-registered, NO weakens branch): if the matured+maintained+differentiated pool clears C1c AND the bias reaches committed action (C1d) but STILL fails to lift committed-class entropy, that is the SHARED selection-authority CONVERSION ceiling (behavioral_diversity_isolation:GAP-A; failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-569g_2026-06-14 + V3-EXQ-682: route-range reaches the E3 accumulator but does not move the F-dominated committed argmax), self-routes non_contributory + route /implement-substrate (same gain/contrast amend as GAP-A) -- NOT a MECH-309/ARC-062 falsification. C1-fail self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue. Smoke: validate_experiments --strict OK; --dry-run end-to-end both arms (substrate_not_ready_requeue at dry scale by design, sentinel written). experiment_purpose=evidence.

items.title: BASE harm-landscape discriminativeness diagnostic (diagnose-first for the SD-059/MECH-358 bridge retest re-queue)
items.note: Diagnose-first (user-chosen) for the 2026-06-11 V3-EXQ-603o substrate_not_ready_requeue. 603o already ran the 603l-autopsy redesign (headroom+continuous metric) and failed ONLY harm_landscape_discriminative_on_base (harm_eval_range>=0.02 on 1/3 seeds at proximity_harm=0.15) while the continuous bridge lift was already strong (both ~50.3 vs base ~18.65). Claim-free (claim_ids=[], diagnostic): BASE arm only (bridge OFF), 4 cells x 3 seeds, Stage-H only; proximity_harm sweep {0.10 positive-control,0.12,0.15} at harm_lr=1e-3 + a {0.15,harm_lr=3e-3} training-strength rescue cell, keyed on the SAME harm_eval_range>=0.02 statistic. Locates whether the base-harm-landscape failure is regime-difficulty (find hardest trainable proximity_harm) or harm-training-strength (3x LR rescue). Positive-control gate: if 0.10 fails on >=2/3, self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue (harm-pathway/metric broken), never a regime verdict. Output is the parameter for the corrected SD-059/MECH-358 evidence re-queue V3-EXQ-603q. V3-EXQ-603o is CONSUMED (completed 2026-06-11).

items.title: InfantCurriculumScheduler Phase 0->1 gate-CRITERION robust sweep: EMA-of-level + window-mean + EMA-with-hold(H=5) + crossing-count>=3 (supersedes V3-EXQ-591e)
items.note: Claim-free gate-CRITERION diagnostic (ARC-046 / infant_substrate:GAP-14 leg c-2); supersedes V3-EXQ-591e (robust-sweep correction of 591e's spike-vulnerable EMA-of-level-only criterion; user-chosen via AskUserQuestion 2026-06-15). 591e replayed ONE candidate EMA(alpha=0.2)-of-level vs the ~0.20 floor; numerically that EMA is spike-responsive (a single per-episode h_pos of 1.453 -- which seed 45 has inside the decision window, baseline advanced 45 at ep 142 -- pushes EMA(0.2) from ~0.1 to ~0.37 > floor, RE-ADMITTING the false-advancer; confirmed in an offline unit-check). 591f replays the SAME deterministic 5-seed (42-46) 160-ep diversity-armed reachability traces (MECH-313 noise floor + MECH-314 curiosity at landed defaults, SP-CEM main-path) through BASELINE single-episode SPIKE (informational) + a SWEEP of 4 sustained-level candidates gated at the genuine-explorer floor ~0.20 (NOT the 0.994 spike bar): B1 EMA-of-level@0.20, B2 trailing-window-mean(W=20)@0.20, B3 EMA-of-level@0.20-with-hold(H=5), B4 crossing-count>=3 of the 0.994 bar. PASS if ANY candidate ADMITS every genuine explorer (42/43/44, mean 0.32-0.84) AND REJECTS the false-advancer (45, mean 0.14, 2 crossings) at the real decision episodes; recommended_criterion is the first discriminating candidate in the preference order [ema_hold, window_mean, crossing_count, ema_level]. PERSISTS full per-episode h_pos arrays (591d kept only per-seed summaries, so the online sustained-level behaviour at the decision episode was unvalidatable from 591d). ep_min=100; same non-vacuity preconditions + two-leg discrimination. PURE OFFLINE replay -- infant_curriculum.py NOT mutated (610e/669/586/667 depend on its default gate). A discriminating PASS routes to /implement-substrate on infant_curriculum.py:_try_phase_0_to_1 as the sustained-level replacement. Seed-46 exploration-STRENGTH collapse is OUT OF SCOPE (orthogonal Q-043/667->667a thread, leg c-1). Does NOT queue EXQ-ISEF-005 (blocked until BOTH GAP-14 legs resolve). claim-free: weights/promotes nothing. The superseded EMA-only V3-EXQ-591e is being held via the coordinator so it does not burn a run. Smoke: validate_experiments --strict OK; --dry-run end-to-end (sentinel written; degenerate-but-exercised at dry scale by design). Queued by the takeover session per user AskUserQuestion 2026-06-15.
